name: rule-engine closed-loop step rule-test runs the rule-tester equivalent on a registered rule
command: mkdir -p tests/no-eval/invalid && printf '{"code":"eval(s)"}\n' > tests/no-eval/invalid/case.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/closed-loop-test.sh" --step rule-test --rule-id no-eval --tests-dir tests --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'rule_tester_invoked=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
